mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ums_token_usage (username, session_id, intent, model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, tool_calls, latency_ms) VALUES (#{username}, #{sessionId}, #{intent}, #{model}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{toolCalls}, #{latencyMs})
mapper.select: SELECT -- 今日 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayTotalTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayRequestCount, -- 本周 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS weeklyTotalTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weeklyRequestCount, -- 本月 IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monthlyTotalTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthlyRequestCount, -- 本月活跃用户数 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN username END) AS monthlyActiveUsers, -- 总计 IFNULL(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COUNT(*) AS totalRequestCount, COUNT(DISTINCT username) AS totalUsers FROM ums_token_usage

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, IFNULL(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COUNT(*) AS requestCount FROM ums_token_usage WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT username, IFNULL(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COUNT(*) AS requestCount FROM ums_token_usage GROUP BY username ORDER BY totalTokens DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT IFNULL(intent, 'unknown') AS intent, IFNULL(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS totalTokens, COUNT(*) AS requestCount FROM ums_token_usage GROUP BY intent ORDER BY totalTokens DESC
